fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-6 running at ~80%+ participation overall
Lodestar/Erigon and Lodestar/Besu nodes stuck after fork; Lodestar/Besu restarted and recovered
devnet-7 imminent: launching after call or end of day; half-million exited validators, 0x02 credentials, EIP-8282 contract deployed manually
devnet-7 gas limit set to 300M (raised from 200M by consensus)

testing_progress.highlight: EL tests (release 7.2): Nethermind, Geth, ethrex passing most; Besu failing ~40 (repricing); Reth branch ready tomorrow morning
Geth 41 consume/engine test failures are mismatched error messages, not real failures
CL tests (alpha.12): Nimbus, Lodestar, Prysm, Lighthouse all passing; Grandine status unknown

el_breakout_eip_7937_fix.highlight: EIP-7937 bug: blocks up to 8x expected max size were constructible due to floor cost applied only at tx level, not block level
Fix already merged in spec release 7.2 and included in devnet-7; only 2-3 tests affected

el_breakout_eip_cleanup.highlight: Proposal to rename 'regular gas' to 'execution gas' in EIP-7937 for forward-compatibility; no consensus change, spec text only
Proposal to consolidate log costs in EIP-8037 (remove separate log transfer cost, absorb into base + transfer-with-value); net values unchanged, targets devnet-8

action_items.action: Draft EIP cleanup PRs (execution gas rename, log cost consolidation) for devnet-8

decisions.decision: EIP-7937 floor-cost block-level fix included in devnet-7 (already in spec 7.2)
EIP terminology cleanup (execution gas rename, log cost consolidation) to proceed for devnet-8; no consensus rule changes

targets.target: devnet-7 launch: end of day July 13 or morning July 14
